author: doll-agent
content: Upgrade fast_exp_f64 and fast_exp_f32 docstrings to prominently call out the subnormal flush. Add a 'Subnormal handling' section pointing readers to the standard library's f64::exp / f32::exp as the subnormal-preserving slow path, plus practical advice on when this matters (log-sum-exp, softmax with large negative inputs) and how to avoid it (LSE shifting trick).
